mapper.update: UPDATE sys_ding_user SET NAME = #{name}, mobile = #{mobile}, position = #{position}, email = #{email}, department = #{departmentId} WHERE userid = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT userid, NAME, mobile, position, department, orgemail, jobnumber FROM sys_ding_user

SELECT userid, NAME, mobile, position, department, orgemail, jobnumber, email FROM sys_ding_user where 1=1
and ( name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or mobile LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or position LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or orgemail LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or jobnumber LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') )
